who: operations managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 client projects/month
offer: For operations managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 client projects/month, inefficient KPI tracking causes missed deadlines and client dissatisfaction. We provide a streamlined reporting tool instead of manual spreadsheets and inconsistent reporting tools.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and reporting on key performance indicators effectively.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for operations managers
Indie Hackers discussions on KPI tracking tools
DM outreach to targeted operations managers with demo
Engage in community forums for marketing operations
try_it: Let users try KPI dashboard for real-time tracking and customizable reporting templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
